category_sources: source_facts.description says web application for archival and reading of manga/doujinshi; official GitHub README describes archival of comics/manga.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository heading uses LANraragi; source_facts.repo points to Difegue/LANraragi.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README links to Documentation at sugoi.gitbook.io.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/Difegue/LANraragi, so repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README lists manga/comics archival, browser reading, Docker-ready server use, archives, tags, and categories.
